ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product configuration */,
  "customer_postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the customer */,
  "store_postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the store */,
  "retail_price" REAL /* Retail price of the product */,
  "screen_size_inches" REAL /* Screen size of the product in inches */,
  "battery_life_hours" REAL /* Battery life of the product in hours */,
  "ram_gb" INTEGER /* RAM size of the product in GB */,
  "processor_speed_ghz" REAL /* Processor speed of the product in GHz */,
  "integrated_wireless" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product has integrated wireless capabilities */,
  "hd_size_gb" INTEGER /* Hard drive size of the product in GB */,
  "bundled_applications" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product comes with bundled applications */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "sales_associate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales associate who handled the transaction */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied to the transaction */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_store_postcode FOREIGN KEY ("store_postcode") REFERENCES stores ("postcode"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_sales_associate_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_associate_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("configuration_id") REFERENCES product_configurations ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_customer_postcode FOREIGN KEY ("customer_postcode") REFERENCES customers ("postcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product configuration */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Model name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product configuration */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "warranty_period_months" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is discontinued */,
  "last_stock_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was last in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the customer */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the customer's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the customer's location */,
  "x_coordinate" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the customer's location */,
  "y_coordinate" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the customer's location */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "preferred_store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's preferred store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the store */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the store's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the store's location */,
  "x_coordinate" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the store's location */,
  "y_coordinate" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the store's location */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store manager */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the store */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product feature */,
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product configuration */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the product feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the product feature */,
  "feature_category" TEXT /* Category of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_features_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("configuration_id") REFERENCES product_configurations ("configuration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales trend entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trend */,
  "sales_volume" INTEGER /* Sales volume for the date */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the products sold on the date */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the products sold */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the products sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES sales_transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer demographic entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the customer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children the customer has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_demographics_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store performance entry */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metrics */,
  "sales_volume" INTEGER /* Sales volume for the date */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the products sold on the date */,
  "customer_volume" INTEGER /* Number of customers visiting the store on the date */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit for the store on the date */,
  "return_volume" INTEGER /* Number of returns on the date */,
  "return_value" REAL /* Total value of returns on the date */,
  "footfall" INTEGER /* Number of people who entered the store on the date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_performance_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales associate, store manager, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
